arguments.command:
python3 -c "
import urllib.request
import json

# 搜索企业数字化转型
try:
    url = 'https://ddg-api.vercel.app/search?q=企业数字化转型+2026&format=json'
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
        data = json.loads(r.read())
        print('=== 企业数字化转型 ===')
        for item in data.get('results', [])[:3]:
            print(item.get('title', ''))
            print(item.get('snippet', '')[:200])
            print('---')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Error: {e}')
" 2>&1

content.thinking: 编码问题。让我用英文关键词搜索。

arguments.command:
python3 -c "
import urllib.request
import json
import urllib.parse

queries = [
    'enterprise digital transformation trends 2026',
    'AI smart security surveillance market 2026',
    'network system integration trends 2026'
]

for q in queries:
    try:
        encoded_q = urllib.parse.quote(q)
        url = f'https://ddg-api.vercel.app/search?q={encoded_q}&format=json'
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
            data = json.loads(r.read())
            print(f'=== {q} ===')
            for item in data.get('results', [])[:2]:
                print(item.get('title', ''))
                print(item.get('snippet', '')[:150])
                print('---')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Error for {q}: {e}')
    print()
" 2>&1
